# Synthetic migration benchmarks

These bundles are fictional, deterministic regression fixtures for BI Migration Studio parsers and reviewed migration workflows. They are test-only assets, are not copied into the production application, and do not contain customer exports, production credentials, or proof of behavioral parity.

The shared Northstar Food Service scenario exists only so each supported source parser can be evaluated against comparable schemas, calculations, relationships, dashboards, and expected Omni-oriented evidence. It is loaded directly by automated tests rather than offered in the product UI. Its names, metrics, formulas, identifiers, narratives, and scores are not canonical product examples and must not be reused in customer deliverables or AI-generated migration output.

Benchmark results measure structured evidence recovery. Production acceptance still requires generated-code validation, branch review, query-result reconciliation, permission review, and dashboard visual review.
